label: first projection
gloss: fst(p) : s for p : Pair(s, t); the first component of an ordered pair.
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record.

nsmBridge.note: pure structural accessor; nothing to explicate.
